creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Unfortunately it's annoying to do.  There used to be support for building ports with QEMU through Poudriere, but it appears that qemu-user is currently broken.  But maybe it'll work again in the future.  What is possible is using QEMU in system emulation mode, but it's very slow.

If you care about ARM, get yourself a Raspberry Pi and build test there.  Current arm64 FreeBSD can run a 32 bit arm userland in a jail, so build a jail for 32 bit testing.
